task: Use the Experiment 2 rubric to prepare code and report deliverables.

tool_specs.name: read_context
tool_specs.description: Read a local experiment context file.

input_schema.path: Path to a UTF-8 markdown context file.

tool_specs.name: extract_rubric
tool_specs.description: Extract deadline, deliverables, evaluation, and reflection requirements.

tool_specs.name: plan_report
tool_specs.description: Plan a short report that aligns with the rubric.

tool_specs.name: draft_reflection
tool_specs.description: Draft a concise AI-use reflection around a specific technical hurdle.

input_schema.fix: Exact engineering response used to resolve it.

tool_specs.name: validate_repository
tool_specs.description: Check whether required repository files exist.

result.content:
# Experiment 2 Rubric

Due: 2026/06/20 23:59:59

## Deliverables

- Code Repository: Agent logic and tool definitions.
- Brief Report: No more than 5 pages, including 3 to 4 execution screenshots and a short reflection on using AI in development.

## Evaluation

- System Mechanics and Tooling: Code repository including all prompts, 40 points.
- Agent Execution: Report screenshots, 40 points.
- Reflection: Report text, 20 points.

## Reflection Requirement

The reflection should be concise and honest. It should identify a specific technical hurdle the AI faced, such as struggling with protocol syntax or hallucinating arguments, and explain exactly how the student engineered a way out of it.

sections.title: Agent code repository
sections.purpose: Provide the GitHub repo and point to prompts, context, tools, and agent logic.

sections.title: Agent design
sections.purpose: Explain the main function, registered tools, and context integration in under 500 words.

sections.title: Agent execution
sections.purpose: Show 3 to 4 screenshots from a real run and explain what each step proves.

sections.title: AI-assisted development reflection
sections.purpose: Describe one concrete AI hurdle and the exact engineering fix.

rubric_alignment.system_mechanics: System Mechanics and Tooling: Code repository including all prompts, 40 points.

arguments.hurdle: AI 曾经把工具参数和文档渲染步骤混在一起，导致输出看似完整但不可复现
arguments.fix: 先把工具 schema 固定在代码里，再用 JSON execution trace 和 DOCX 渲染结果逐项核对

result.hurdle: AI 曾经把工具参数和文档渲染步骤混在一起，导致输出看似完整但不可复现
result.fix: 先把工具 schema 固定在代码里，再用 JSON execution trace 和 DOCX 渲染结果逐项核对
result.text: 在完成实验时，AI 最明显的问题不是不会写代码，而是会把工具调用协议想得过于自由。具体表现是：AI 曾经把工具参数和文档渲染步骤混在一起，导致输出看似完整但不可复现。我没有直接相信第一次输出，而是把需求拆成可验证的小步骤，先查看项目结构和模板，再固定工具输入格式，最后用 demo 输出和文档渲染结果反复检查。解决办法是：先把工具 schema 固定在代码里，再用 JSON execution trace 和 DOCX 渲染结果逐项核对。这个过程让我意识到，AI 更适合做候选方案和初稿，最终质量仍然需要通过明确约束、可复现执行和人工验收来保证。

final_answer:

Report sections: Agent code repository, Agent design, Agent execution, AI-assisted development reflection
Reflection focus: AI 曾经把工具参数和文档渲染步骤混在一起，导致输出看似完整但不可复现
Next action: submit the repository and the filled short report with execution screenshots.
